recommendations.title: Leprechaun 2
recommendations.overview: A thousand years ago, the Leprechaun left a bloody trail when he ripped through the countryside in search of his stolen gold. Now he's back in the big city using all of his deadly tricks to snare the girl of his nightmares. His bloody quest becomes m

recommendations.title: The Cremator
recommendations.overview: In 1930s Prague, a Czech cremator who firmly believes cremation relieves one from earthly suffering is drawn inexorably to Nazism.

recommendations.title: The Luck of the Irish
recommendations.overview: A teenager must battle for a gold charm to keep his family from being controlled by an evil leprechaun.

recommendations.title: Leprechaun: Back 2 tha Hood
recommendations.overview: When Emily Woodrow and her friends happen on a treasure chest full of gold coins, they fail to to heed the warnings of a wise old psychic who had foretold that they would encounter trouble with a very nasty and protective Leprechaun.

recommendations.title: Nekrotronic
recommendations.overview: A man discovers that he is part of a secret sect of magical beings who hunt down and destroy demons in the internet.

recommendations.title: The Grapes of Death
recommendations.overview: A young woman discovers that the pesticide being sprayed on vineyards is turning people into murderous lunatics.

recommendations.title: Sting
recommendations.overview: After raising an unnervingly talented spider in secret, 12-year-old Charlotte must face the truth about her pet and fight for her family's survival.

recommendations.title: Leprechaun Returns
recommendations.overview: A group of unwitting sorority sisters accidentally awaken the serial-killing Leprechaun after they build a sorority house on his hunting grounds.

recommendations.title: Wyrmwood: Apocalypse
recommendations.overview: In a zombie-infested Australian wasteland, soldier Rhys has dedicated his life to tracking and capturing survivors for the Surgeon General in hopes of finding a cure.

recommendations.title: The Jester
recommendations.overview: A malevolent being known as The Jester terrorizes the inhabitants of a small town on Halloween night, including two estranged sisters who must come together to find a way to defeat this evil entity.
